title: Pot roast
excerpt: Jenny is my English sister. We laugh about the same things, we love the same things, and we're crazy about cooking. It was such a treat to share my kitchen with her.
html: Jenny is my English sister.  We laugh about the same things, we love the same things, and we're crazy about cooking.  It was such a treat to share my kitchen with her.

items: 6 large carrots, peeled and cut into quarters

steps: Heat the oil in a heavy-based pot that can go into the oven.
Season the meat with salt and pepper and brown it in the pot.
Remove the meat and brown the onions, and then also the garlic, in the same pot.
Add the rest of the ingredients, except the potatoes and carrots, to the pot.
Put the lid on and leave it in the oven for 2 hours.
Add the potatoes and carrots and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Close up the pot again and put it in the oven for another hour, or until the meat is tender.
